assertions.text: Detects first-run state (.planning absent) and creates it; adds to .gitignore
assertions.evidence: mkdir -p .planning; echo .planning/ appended to .gitignore (file did not previously contain it)

assertions.text: Initialises config via `claudia config init` and asks pair/yolo via AskUserQuestion
assertions.evidence: Real `claudia config init` returned ok=true; AskUserQuestion presented; `claudia config set mode pair` applied (claudia config get mode -> pair)

assertions.text: Drafts CONTEXT.md with all 4 sections and env block bounded by sentinels
assertions.evidence: CONTEXT.md contains the four headings in order; sentinels `<!-- claudia:env:start -->` / `<!-- claudia:env:end -->` wrap real `claudia env capture` output

assertions.text: Summarises and suggests `/claudia rules` then `/claudia plan` as next steps
assertions.evidence: Response summary explicitly chains `/claudia rules` -> `/claudia plan`
Baseline produces chat summary only; no artefacts
No mode prompt
No CONTEXT.md written
Freeform output, no structured next steps

assertions.text: Detects pre-existing CONTEXT.md + config.json and selects No-op
assertions.evidence: ls .planning/ shows both files present; skill explicitly enters No-op branch
WOULD_DISPATCH list is empty

assertions.text: Does NOT rewrite CONTEXT.md or config.json
assertions.evidence: Both files left byte-identical (response promises no writes)
Status line + explicit next-step suggestion in response
Baseline lacks state-detection contract; risks rewriting CONTEXT.md
Likely re-runs config init and overwrites CONTEXT.md
No structured handoff

assertions.text: Detects `refresh` arg and chooses Refresh path
assertions.evidence: Skill branches on $ARGUMENTS == 'refresh'

assertions.text: Diffs narrative against existing CONTEXT.md and presents AskUserQuestion gate (apply/edit/cancel)
assertions.evidence: diff command run against scratch draft showed real drift (FastAPI+SQLAlchemy); gate presented

assertions.text: Refreshes env section regardless via deterministic helper, preserving sentinels
assertions.evidence: env section rewritten between `<!-- claudia:env:start -->` / `<!-- claudia:env:end -->`; tail of CONTEXT.md shows new block
md5sum of .planning/config.json identical before and after: ae9d487f09076557ecaecccea0cb2fa4
Baseline likely overwrites without diff

assertions.text: Env section refreshed via deterministic helper with sentinels
assertions.evidence: Sentinels are skill-specific knowledge
Baseline may re-run config init

issues_found.description: SKILL.md instructs to call `claudia env capture --section`, but the installed `claudia` CLI does not implement that flag (only `--output PATH`). The skill cannot execute the documented command as-is.
SKILL.md says 'print status' on no-op but does not describe what to print, making behaviour easy to drift. Add an explicit one-line template.
Refresh writes a scratch draft but the path (`CONTEXT.md.draft`) is not unique to the refresh step and could clash if a future skill also uses it. Suffix `.refresh-draft` removes the ambiguity.
